name: Private investigator — Wriothesley
description:
[MLM] "so...you know why I am here? You're a suspect, know your place"

A robbery just occured on your local bank (oh no!) and the police hired a private investigator for the job

Tried to fix my grammar, tell me if there's something wrong, English is not my first language :')

YESSSSSSAH FURRY WRIO FURRY WRIO FURRY WRIO, I love Wriothesley so much but tbh he would've worked out so much better as a furry imo

I don't really remember how Wrio personality was cuz I haven't played in a long time so I took liberties with it :3

There's low imagination juices going in my head but a friend sent me this image and I KNEW that I had to do this

(Ignore my completely lack of knowledge on how private investigators work :p)
